query:
INSERT INTO resources (createdBy, title, description, type, category, externalUrl, tags, isArchived, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES
((SELECT id FROM users WHERE role = 'admin' LIMIT 1), 'How to Reconstitute Peptides', 'Step-by-step instructional video demonstrating the proper method of reconstituting lyophilized peptides using bacteriostatic water. Covers sterile technique, drawing the correct volume, gentle mixing to avoid damaging the peptide, and proper storage after reconstitution.', 'link', 'peptides', 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tcEWjyQfDLc', '["peptides", "reconstitution", "bacteriostatic water", "injection prep", "video"]', false, NOW(), NOW()),
((SELECT id FROM users WHERE role = 'admin' LIMIT 1), 'Subcutaneous Injection Technique', 'Patient education video demonstrating how to self-administer a subcutaneous (Sub-Q) injection. Covers proper injection sites (abdomen, thigh), skin pinching technique, needle angle, and safe disposal. Ideal for patients starting peptide or hormone therapy requiring subcutaneous administration.', 'link', 'general', 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wXjQHAxopzk', '["subcutaneous", "injection", "self-injection", "patient education", "video"]', false, NOW(), NOW()),
((SELECT id FROM users WHERE role = 'admin' LIMIT 1), 'Intramuscular Injection Technique', 'Patient education video demonstrating how to self-administer an intramuscular (IM) injection. Covers proper injection sites (deltoid, vastus lateralis, ventrogluteal), Z-track technique, needle selection, aspiration, and safe disposal. Essential for patients on testosterone or other IM-administered therapies.', 'link', 'general', 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fMEZdNodGM0', '["intramuscular", "injection", "self-injection", "patient education", "video"]', false, NOW(), NOW());
